title: polemonium eximium
intro: Polemonium eximium, commonly known as Sky Pilot or Western Sky Pilot, is a perennial alpine plant native to the western parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of Polemonium eximium can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
